mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT A.id, A.MENU_NAME as name, A.PATH, A.COMPONENT, A.VISIBLE as hidden, A.ICON, A.ORDER_NUM, A.IS_FRAME, A.MENU_ICON_COLOR as menuIconColor, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(B1.ID) FROM SYS_MENU B1 WHERE B1.PARENT_ID = A.ID AND B1.MENU_TYPE IN ('M', 'C')) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS always_show, CASE WHEN E.ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS IS_QUICK_ENTER, A.query
FROM SYS_MENU A LEFT JOIN SYS_CUSTOM_REGION E ON A.id = E.MENU_ID AND E.USER_ID= #{userId} where A.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND a.MENU_TYPE IN ('M', 'C') AND A.status = 0
FROM SYS_MENU A JOIN SYS_ROLE_MENU B ON B.MENU_ID = A.ID JOIN SYS_ROLE_USER C ON C.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID LEFT JOIN SYS_CUSTOM_REGION E ON A.id = E.MENU_ID AND E.USER_ID= #{userId} where C.USER_ID = #{userId} AND A.PARENT_ID = #{parentId} AND A.MENU_TYPE IN ('M', 'C') AND A.status = 0
AND A.DATA_TYPE = #{loginType} AND A.VISIBLE = 0 ORDER BY A.ORDER_NUM
